description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat and slightly sloped roof, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior wall finishes. The structure is surrounded by a neatly maintained lawn, enclosed by a low boundary wall, and includes several trees and a small play structure in the backyard. The front facade has a wide driveway leading to a double garage, a paved walkway, and a covered entryway. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the building, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a patio area, ideal for outdoor seating. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of functional and aesthetic landscaping.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a double garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. The design features clean lines, a mix of dark and light finishes, and a backyard play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, paved driveway, and a portion of the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall chimney, asymmetrical window arrangement, and backyard play structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, large windows, and more of the green lawn with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage doors, side lawn, and boundary wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
